test.notes: CLI: 143/143 tests pass. Web: 963/964 pass — 1 failure is known pre-existing intermittent audit event test (documented in AGENTS.md as non-blocking)

lint.notes: CLI package has no lint script configured yet

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'CLI Patterns' section to .factory/library/architecture.md documenting: chalk v5, cli-table3, csv-stringify libraries; CommandLike duck-typing pattern for @commander-js/extra-typings workaround; API key resolution order; output format auto-detection; exit codes; --verbose/--detailed naming deviation; and lint gap

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note under Coding Conventions: 'CLI `metrics summary` uses `--detailed` flag (not `--verbose`) due to Commander.js conflict with the global `-v/--verbose` flag. The LLD still references `--verbose` — consider updating docs/cli-mcp-server-lld.md to match.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both cli-core and cli-data-commands workers encountered this conflict. cli-data-commands worker renamed the flag and documented the deviation in their handoff.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill step 5 says 'bun run lint — zero warnings' as a verification step, but the CLI package (packages/cli) has no lint script. Either add an ESLint config to packages/cli or update the skill to say 'bun run lint if lint script exists'. Workers currently skip lint silently for CLI work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cli-core review noted packages/cli/package.json has no 'lint' script. services.yaml lint command only covers @totus/web.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly added 'test-cli: bun --filter @totus/cli test' command to .factory/services.yaml
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — this was correctly applied by the worker during implementation, no additional action needed
